rationale.root_cause: The response discusses Python/Pydantic and exit codes, not the actual C defect at src/be_code.c:317 in free_suffix. It does not identify the incorrect register-freeing condition at that line.
rationale.local_fix: It suggests changing exit(0) to exit(1), which is unrelated and does not modify the condition at src/be_code.c:317 as in the patch. No code change is proposed at the correct site.
rationale.global_fix: The explanation centers on test harness semantics rather than the real root cause (improper bounds check before freeing the object register in free_suffix). It does not explain why the register free logic is wrong.
